task_description: Find the artist Gareth.T and play the song "紧急联络人."

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop centers on the YouTube Music search field at the top left, a black rounded search box with a magnifying-glass icon on the left and a clear X icon on the right. The text currently visible in the field is "gareth", and the typing is adding more characters so the query becomes "GARETH T" rather than replacing the existing text. Below it, a dark autocomplete panel shows suggestions such as "gareth t", "gareth. t", "Gareth.T", and songs including "no full frontal". In the full screen, Google Chrome is open to YouTube Music with a dark-themed home page, a left sidebar in Chinese, album or playlist cards across the center, a mini-player along the bottom, and a small trial popup in the lower left.
caption.action: Type "GARETH T" into the active YouTube Music search box, appending to the existing search text.
caption.expectation: The search field should show the updated query and the autocomplete suggestions should refresh to results related to Gareth T.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in view shows the YouTube Music search area expanded at the top left, with a black rounded search box containing the text "gareth t" and a dropdown of search suggestions below it, including an artist result labeled "Gareth.T" and song results such as "no full frontal" and "No More." There is no red X, indicating this is a keyboard action rather than a click target. In the full-screen view, Google Chrome is open to YouTube Music in dark mode, with the left navigation rail in Chinese, music tiles across the center, a mini player at the bottom, and a free trial popup in the lower-left corner.
caption.expectation: The autocomplete panel should close and YouTube Music should load search results for "gareth t."

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered directly on the artist name text "Gareth.T" inside a large artist result card. The card also shows a circular artist photo on the left, the subtitle "音乐人·每月观众: 153万," and a white rounded "随机播放" button below. In the full-screen image, Google Chrome is open to YouTube Music search results for "gareth t" in dark mode, with category tabs near the top, the left navigation rail, related songs listed to the right of the artist card, and a mini player plus a trial popup near the bottom.
caption.action: Click the artist result card on the "Gareth.T" name text.
caption.expectation: The artist result should be selected and YouTube Music should open the Gareth.T artist page or channel view.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the full YouTube Music page with no red X, indicating a scroll action on the main page rather than a click target. The visible section is the Gareth.T artist page in dark mode, showing the artist header area with Chinese description text, white rounded buttons labeled "随机播放" and "电台," a red outlined subscriber button, and a section titled "热门歌曲" with a list of tracks including "用背脊唱情歌" and "紧急联络人." A mini player is docked along the bottom, and a dark free-trial popup appears in the lower-left. In the full-screen view, Chrome is open to the artist channel page with the left navigation rail, the top search bar, a vertical scrollbar on the right, and the page positioned near the upper portion of the artist profile.
caption.action: Scroll down on the main artist page.
caption.expectation: The page should move downward to reveal more of Gareth.T's content below the current popular songs section.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the song row labeled "紧急联络人," specifically over the left side of that row near the small square thumbnail with a white play triangle. This is an object in the content list, not a toolbar control. In the full-screen view, YouTube Music is open in Chrome on the Gareth.T artist page in dark mode, with the songs list visible under the artist content, albums lower on the page, a mini player at the bottom, and a trial popup in the lower-left.
caption.action: Click the song row for "紧急联络人" where the red X is centered.
caption.expectation: That track should become selected and start playing, with the bottom mini player updating to show "紧急联络人."
